title: Uruguayan Cheese Sandwich
description: A classic Uruguayan dish, this rich and smoky cheese sandwich is perfect for a quick meal or snack.
instructions: Preheat a griddle or pan over medium heat.
Butter one side of each slice of bread.
Place one slice of bread, butter-side down, on the griddle.
Top with a slice of deli meat, a few slices of cheese, and a sprinkle of parsley.
Place the second slice of bread, butter-side up, on top of the filling.
Cook for 2-3 minutes, or until the bread is golden brown and the cheese is melted.
Flip the sandwich over and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the other side is also golden brown.
